situation: Xiaosong gave feedback that my design reviews were too focused on compliance and design system rules, not enough on pushing for beauty
root_cause: Review mindset was auditor-mode (checklist compliance) instead of creative director mode (push for stunning work)
solution: Updated SOUL.md to prioritize beauty over compliance. Added Emotion Test. Added 'checklist design' as an auto-reject. Shifted from 'does it follow rules' to 'does it make me feel something'
lesson: Design systems are guardrails, not ceilings. Break them when it makes things more beautiful. Encourage boldness, not just correctness.
